name: Brigitte's Mincemeat Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening.
2. Add sugar and blend well.
3. Add eggs, and beat until smooth.
4. Gradually add mixed dry ingredients.
5. Stir in mincemeat.
6. Blend until combined.
7. Drop by teaspoonful onto a greased cookie sheet, at least 2 inches apart.
8. Bake at 400°F for 12 minutes or until lightly browned.
- You can use margarine instead of shortening and add chopped nuts if desired.
- You can also mix the sugars using both brown and white sugar.
